nodes.title: Initialize Combat
nodes.description: Given a list of player characters and enemy characters, when InitializeCombat() is called, then PlayerCharacters and EnemyCharacters are set, TurnOrder is computed by descending Speed, and nulls are excluded.

nodes.title: Start Combat
nodes.description: Given combat is initialized, when StartCombat() is called, then State becomes WaitingForInput, TurnNumber is 1, crit pressure resets to 0, CurrentCharacter is first in TurnOrder, and OnTurnChanged fires.

nodes.title: Calculate Turn Order
nodes.description: Given characters with varying Speed stats, when CalculateTurnOrder runs, then characters are sorted descending by Speed. Nulls are handled gracefully (Speed treated as 0).

nodes.title: Next Turn Skips Dead
nodes.description: Given combat with some dead characters, when NextTurn() is called, then dead characters are skipped and the next alive character becomes CurrentCharacter. Wraps around the turn order list.

nodes.title: Next Turn Increments
nodes.description: Given combat is running, when NextTurn() is called, then TurnNumber increments by 1 and OnTurnChanged fires with the new CurrentCharacter.

nodes.title: End Turn Fires Event
nodes.description: Given a character's turn is active, when EndTurn() is called, then the character's OnTurnEnd event is invoked.

nodes.title: Check Combat End Victory
nodes.description: Given all enemy characters have 0 health, when CheckCombatEnd runs (via NextTurn), then State becomes CombatEnded and OnCombatEnded fires.

nodes.title: Check Combat End Defeat
nodes.description: Given all player characters have 0 health, when CheckCombatEnd runs (via NextTurn), then State becomes CombatEnded and OnCombatEnded fires.

nodes.title: Is Player Turn
nodes.description: Given combat is running, when IsPlayerTurn() is called, then returns true if CurrentCharacter is in PlayerCharacters list, false otherwise.

nodes.title: Add Character Mid Combat
nodes.description: Given combat is running, when AddCharacterToCombat() is called with a character and isPlayer flag, then character is added to the correct list, added to TurnOrder, and turn order is re-sorted by Speed.

nodes.title: On Action Executed Event
nodes.description: Given combat is running, when an action is executed via ExecuteAction(), then OnActionExecuted event fires with (executor, target, action) parameters.
